name: Buttermilk Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg, buttermilk, and water in a bowl. Add salt and baking soda.
2. Stir in enough corn meal until the mixture reaches a cake batter consistency.
3. Pour into a well-greased 10-inch pan.
4. Bake at 500 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes.
